title: Ending of 111
wikitext:
[]: Ending of 1.11             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Fri Apr 20, 2012 5:55 pm Considering i've only recently got into Evangelion again after a long hiatus i'm left wondering after rewatching 1.11 about the ending... the coffins and Kaworu and Seele and hoping if someone could provide some of their own theories on this ending? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Fri Apr 20, 2012 7:00 pm The coffins are either for the Angels that have died, the Angels who have yet to be faced, or the Angels from the original series. I'm afraid that's all I can theorize about.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Apr 21, 2012 8:06 am ^ Or, they are the children... this theory is getting backed up by the many yet-unknown silhouettes in behind the eva-store.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat Apr 21, 2012 8:36 pm ^ Couldja post some pictures, please? That sounds interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Sat Apr 21, 2012 8:46 pm Henry Spencer wrote: ^ Couldja post some pictures, please? That sounds interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat Apr 21, 2012 8:50 pm ^ Cool. Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Thu Apr 26, 2012 12:04 pm Henry Spencer wrote: The coffins are either for the Angels that have died, the Angels who have yet to be faced, or the Angels from the original series. I'm afraid that's all I can theorize about.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat May 05, 2012 11:06 pm Aozora wrote: Perhaps the coffins are just for Kaworu/Kaworu clones?

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Sun May 06, 2012 4:21 pm I'm not gonna lie,I have tried to break down most of eva, but those coffins are one thing I am letting go and just seeing where that story arc goes.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun May 06, 2012 7:04 pm Well seeing as how we already know 3.0 is going to have a Unit 2 capable of fighting in space I would not be surprised to see those coffins show up again in either the next film or Final.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 06, 2012 8:09 pm Henry Spencer wrote: It doesn't seem like there would have been anything that would've killed him at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Drabant » Mon May 07, 2012 7:53 am Reichu wrote: I want to think that the coffins have something to do with whatever "Seele's Children" are.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 07, 2012 11:34 am Drabant wrote: If you look at Kaworu's scenes on the moon, he might not be in a vacuum. There's some fluttering in his hair when he puts on his plug-suit, which means there's some gases, probably air surrounding him.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Mon May 07, 2012 12:04 pm Drabant wrote: My guess is that he's generating an AT-field around him which contains air somehow, and also shields him from being affected by the temperature difference.

[]:             Quote Post by Drabant » Mon May 07, 2012 12:39 pm Ornette wrote: That looked like it was from the gases being sucked out of the plugsuit. Also, the fluttering of things like a flag happens in a vacuum (like on the moon landing), since there's no air to cause the movement to stop once it's set in motion, but that doesn't look like what's happening here. The fact that Kaworu's hair does stop fluttering seems to indicate some kind of air resistance.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon May 07, 2012 2:25 pm @Drabant: That final image was really illuminating! You've identified one of the Adams from Second Impact!

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Mon May 07, 2012 7:45 pm Calling it now: the world of NGE was created by Dr. Manhattan after he left the Earth so he could understand human nature better. Why else would there be so much psychological talk going on in the series?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed May 09, 2012 1:37 am It's kind of interesting that he uses a plug suit in the first place -- if his powers are comparable to NGE's Kaworu, he doesn't really need one.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Wed May 09, 2012 7:57 pm ^ Who says he's even an Angel this time around? We don't know that for certain, and we don't even know what clone number the current Rei is.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed May 09, 2012 8:13 pm Henry Spencer wrote: we don't even know what clone number the current Rei is.
summary:
[]: Ending of 1.11             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Fri Apr 20, 2012 5:55 pm Considering i've only recently got into Evangelion again after a long hiatus i'm left wondering after rewatching 1.11 about the ending... the coffins and Kaworu and Seele and hoping if someone could provide some of their own theories on this ending? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer &r
